description.en: Use when a user wants to execute a multi-sig proposal that has already reached quorum. Only board members can execute. The proposal must have enough signatures before it can be performed.
description.de: Use when a user wants to execute a multi-sig proposal that has already reached quorum. Only board members can execute. The proposal must have enough signatures before it can be performed.
description.es: Use when a user wants to execute a multi-sig proposal that has already reached quorum. Only board members can execute. The proposal must have enough signatures before it can be performed.
description.fr: Use when a user wants to execute a multi-sig proposal that has already reached quorum. Only board members can execute. The proposal must have enough signatures before it can be performed.
description.ro: Use when a user wants to execute a multi-sig proposal that has already reached quorum. Only board members can execute. The proposal must have enough signatures before it can be performed.
description.it: Use when a user wants to execute a multi-sig proposal that has already reached quorum. Only board members can execute. The proposal must have enough signatures before it can be performed.

inputs.description: The ID of the proposal to execute.
inputs.bot: If the user hasn't specified an action ID, first run 'Get Pending Actions' to show what's available.

label.ro: Fii notificat despre executările cu succes

body.es: Propuesta #{{ACTION_ID}} ha sido ejecutada con éxito
body.fr: La proposition #{{ACTION_ID}} a été exécutée avec succès
body.ro: Propunerea #{{ACTION_ID}} a fost executată cu succes
body.it: La proposta #{{ACTION_ID}} è stata eseguita con successo
